lumnix.name: Lumnix
lumnix.description: AI-powered e-commerce research tools via MCP. Search Amazon, Alibaba & AliExpress for winning products, vet suppliers, and calculate margins — all in your AI assistant. 19 tools, 3 pricing tiers.

tools.name: search_amazon_products
tools.description: Search Amazon for products by keyword

tools.name: get_amazon_product_details
tools.description: Get detailed product information from Amazon

tools.name: get_amazon_keepa_data
tools.description: Get Keepa price history and sales data

tools.name: search_alibaba_products
tools.description: Search Alibaba for suppliers and products

tools.name: get_alibaba_product_details
tools.description: Get detailed supplier information from Alibaba

tools.name: calculate_profit
tools.description: Calculate FBA profit margins including fees

tools.name: get_amazon_niche_analysis
tools.description: Analyze a niche's competition and opportunity

tools.name: get_alibaba_rfq
tools.description: Create and manage Request for Quotation

tools.name: get_aliexpress_product_details
tools.description: Get detailed product information from AliExpress
